content: Read @AI_PARTNER_CONTEXT.md. Currently when users submit reports and articles, we crawl the article content and return it to the frontend via API to display the article title and summary. There is a UX issue where our crawler does not always successfully return the article title. Also, the article content is in markdown format which is hard to render well on the frontend. The current plan is to run the crawled content through AI (using the Doubao model) after the crawler returns -- the AI input would be all the crawled content, we select the valid article content, then have the AI generate a title if there is not one, and simultaneously generate a summary of no more than 100 characters. These two things would be returned from the API to the frontend as a fallback for the original. Also in the article sub-session, we currently submit an article card that displays the article content by simply showing the raw markdown -- this should be replaced with the article summary we just described. You may need to add a new column in the database to store this summary. I am not sure if the current schema has it. Give me a plan. /autoresearch Iterations: 10 ultrathink

# AI Partner Business Context

Quick onboarding document for AI. Baseline dateпЉЪ2026-03-31гАВ

## Scope

AI Partner is an AI partner product that interacts with bosses through IM (Tencent IM Work groups). Frontend and backend in the same repo, three-layer test coverageгАВ

| Layer | Module | Description |
|----|------|------|
| Frontend | `packages-pc/hddr` | Vue 3 + ViteпЉМBoss and Claw two routing domains |
| HTTP API | `aicenterapi` | Gateway, frontend-facing |
| WebSocket | `meetingwsapi` | Real-time meeting audio and transcription |
| RPC Core | `hd_ai_search` | DB / IM / LLM all here |
| E2E server | `test/e2e/server` | Standalone test backend, reuses production handlers |

Three main business linesпЉЪ**Meeting Analysis**гАБ**Report Analysis**гАБ**Article Analysis**гАВAll interact with bosses through IM group messagesгАВ

---

    16вЖТ)
    17вЖТ
    18вЖТfunc (s *Service) shouldUseArticleBootstrapPipeline(in *hd_ai_search.ImChatRequest) (bool, error) {
    19вЖТ	sessionType, useSessionInput, err := s.resolveArticleBootstrapSessionContext(in)
    20вЖТ	if err != nil {
    21вЖТ		return false, err
    22вЖТ	}
    23вЖТ	return useSessionInput && sessionType == int64(SESSION_TYPE.ARTICLE.Code), nil
    24вЖТ}
    25вЖТ
    26вЖТfunc (s *Service) executeArticleBootstrapPipeline(ctx context.Context, in *hd_ai_search.ImChatRequest, sessionID string, executionCtx *BootstrapExecutionContext, externalSender stream_chat.ExternalStreamSender) error {
    27вЖТ	s.Logger.Infof("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline begin in=%s session_id=%s", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID)
    28вЖТ
    29вЖТ	articleCtx := s.loadArticleContextForSession(sessionID)
    30вЖТ	if articleCtx == nil {
    31вЖТ		err := hderror.NewErrorMsg(hderror_code.FAIL, "executeArticleBootstrapPipeline articleonbelowtextalreadyexpire")
    32вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline article_ctx_missing in=%s session_id=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, err)
    33вЖТ		return err
    34вЖТ	}
    35вЖТ	payload := in.GetSessionInputPayload()
    36вЖТ	articleSource, err := buildArticleSourceStepOutput(payload, articleCtx)
    37вЖТ	if err != nil {
    38вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline buildArticleSourceStepOutput_failed in=%s session_id=%s payload=%s article_ctx=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(payload), hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(articleCtx), err)
    39вЖТ		return err
    40вЖТ	}
    41вЖТ
    42вЖТ	runner, err := s.newArticleTaskRunner(
    43вЖТ		ctx,
    44вЖТ		strings.TrimSpace(in.GetUserId()),
    45вЖТ		sessionID,
    46вЖТ		articleBootstrapTaskType,
    47вЖТ		withArticleTaskReuseExistingTask(),
    48вЖТ		withArticleTaskReuseStepByIdentifier(),
    49вЖТ	)
    50вЖТ	if err != nil {
    51вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline newArticleTaskRunner_failed in=%s session_id=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, err)
    52вЖТ		return err
    53вЖТ	}
    54вЖТ
    55вЖТ	sourceRaw, err := runner.executeStep(articleStepSourceIdentifier, "articleoriginaltext", TASK_STEP.READING.Code, func() (string, error) {
    56вЖТ		raw, marshalErr := json.Marshal(articleSource)
    57вЖТ		if marshalErr != nil {
    58вЖТ			return "", marshalErr
    59вЖТ		}
    60вЖТ		return string(raw), nil
    61вЖТ	})
    62вЖТ	if err != nil {
    63вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()
    64вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline execute_source_failed in=%s session_id=%s article_source=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(articleSource), err)
    65вЖТ		return err
    66вЖТ	}
    67вЖТ	var persistedArticleSource articleSourceStepOutput
    68вЖТ	if err = json.Unmarshal([]byte(strings.TrimSpace(sourceRaw)), &persistedArticleSource); err != nil {
    69вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()
    70вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline unmarshal_source_failed in=%s session_id=%s raw=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, strings.TrimSpace(sourceRaw), err)
    71вЖТ		return err
    72вЖТ	}
    73вЖТ
    74вЖТ	a01Raw, err := runner.executeStep(articleStepA01Identifier, "articleassociatedetermine", TASK_STEP.READING.Code, func() (string, error) {
    75вЖТ		out, runErr := s.runArticleA01Step(ctx, strings.TrimSpace(in.GetUserId()), sessionID, &persistedArticleSource)
    76вЖТ		if runErr != nil {
    77вЖТ			return "", runErr
    78вЖТ		}
    79вЖТ		raw, marshalErr := json.Marshal(out)
    80вЖТ		if marshalErr != nil {
    81вЖТ			return "", marshalErr
    82вЖТ		}
    83вЖТ		return string(raw), nil
    84вЖТ	})
    85вЖТ	if err != nil {
    86вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()
    87вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline execute_a01_failed in=%s session_id=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, err)
    88вЖТ		return err
    89вЖТ	}
    90вЖТ
    91вЖТ	var a01Out articleA01StepOutput
    92вЖТ	if err = json.Unmarshal([]byte(strings.TrimSpace(a01Raw)), &a01Out); err != nil {
    93вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()
    94вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline unmarshal_a01_failed in=%s session_id=%s raw=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, strings.TrimSpace(a01Raw), err)
    95вЖТ		return err
    96вЖТ	}
    97вЖТ
    98вЖТ	if err = s.closeExternalSender(externalSender); err != nil {
    99вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()
   100вЖТ		s.Logger.Errorf("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline closeExternalSender_failed in=%s session_id=%s err=%v", hd_string.ObjToJsonStr(in), sessionID, err)
   101вЖТ		return err
   102вЖТ	}
   103вЖТ
   104вЖТ	s.Logger.Infof("executeArticleBootstrapPipeline persist_main_session_card_begin session_id=%s task_id=%d step_id=%d", sessionID, runner.task.TaskId, runner.task.CurrentStepId)
   105вЖТ	if err = persistArticleMainSessionCardContext(s.Logger, s.svcCtx.MemoryRedis, sessionID, a01Out); err != nil {
   106вЖТ		_ = runner.failTask()

   128вЖТ	a01MsgSeq, err := sendArticleCustomMessageWithResult(ctx, s.Logger, imClient, sessionID, resultCard)
